---
title: "Lingzhu Shen"
description-meta: "I am a first-year Ph.D. student in Biomedical and Health Informatics at Case Western Reserve University."
image: files/profile/profile1.jpg
page-navigation: false
toc: false
#sidebar: false
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    css: styles.css
    toc: true
    footnotes-hover: true
    code-copy: true
    code-link: true
    code-overflow: wrap
    fig-align: center
    link-external-icon: false
    link-external-newwindow: true
    email-obfuscation: javascript
    link-external-filter: '^(?:http:|https:)\/\/drganghe\.github\.io\/custom'
    include-in-header: "files/includes/_academic.qmd"
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 70%
  links:
    # - icon: sun
    #   text: DeepPolicyLab
    #   href: https://deeppolicylab.github.io
    #   target: _blank
    # - icon: globe
    #   text: CUNYprofile
    #   href: https://www.baruch.cuny.edu/profiles/faculty/Gang-He
    #   target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-mail
      href: mailto:lxs888@case.edu
#    - icon: github
#      text: Github
#      href: https://github.com/drganghe
#    - icon: twitter
#      text: Twitter
#      href: https://twitter.com/DrGangHe
#    - icon: mastodon
#      text: Mastodon
#      href: https://mastodon.social/@hegang      
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/lingzhushen/
      target: _blank
    # - icon: youtube
    #   text: YouTube
    #   href: https://www.youtube.com/@DrGangHe     
    #   target: _blank 
    # - text: "{{< ai orcid >}} ORCID"   # use academic icons, "" are needed
    #   href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-8416-1965
    #   target: _blank
    # - text: "{{< ai clarivate >}} Web of Science"
    #   href: https://www.webofscience.com/wos/author/record/N-4549-2013  
    #   target: _blank
    # - text: "{{< ai scopus >}} Scopus"
    #   href: https://www.scopus.com/authid/detail.uri?authorId=55607981900
    #   target: _blank
    # - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
    #   href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=vf90AuEAAAAJ
    #   target: _blank
    # - text: "{{< ai researchgate >}} Research Gate"
    #   href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Gang-He-19
    #   target: _blank
---


:::{#hero-heading}

I'm a first-year PhD student in [Biomedical and Health Informatics](https://case.edu/medicine/pqhs/education/biomedical-health-informatics/phd-biomedical-health-informatics) at Case Western Reserve University, Department of Population and Quantitative Health Sciences. Before that, I did my Master's degree in [Biomedical Engineering at Johns Hopkins University](https://www.bme.jhu.edu/) and my Bachelor's degree in [Biological Science at Zhejiang University](http://www.cls.en.zju.edu.cn/).

My research interests focus on the development of epigenomics-centered multi-omics analysis methods, and their applications in the real world. This includes developing user-friendly tools to simplify bioinformatics analysis, utilizing statistical methods to model high-throughput omics data, and identifing differential epigenetics biomarkers. My primary approaches involve software development, bioinformatics analysis, and machine learning. Currently, I am working with [Dr. Hao Feng](https://hfenglab.org/) in my first rotation, focusing on statistical modeling of multi-omics data and the development of bioinformatics tools.

If you're interested in my research or potential collaborations, feel free to drop me an e-mail!
